message:
feat(tui): expand timeline, threading, compose, and persistence subsystems

Major TUI functionality expansion across multiple screens:

- Timeline screen: add ~630 lines of timeline visualization with filtering,
  navigation, and real-time update support for message flow analysis
- Compose panel: extend validated message composition with recipient
  completion, subject/body editing, and dispatch integration
- Threads screen: improve thread navigation with inline expansion,
  participant tracking, and thread-level action support
- Messages screen: enhance message display with attachment handling,
  read/ack status indicators, and contextual reply support
- Persistence layer: expand state serialization for new screen elements
  with migration support for existing TUI state files
- Bridge: wire new TUI operations through the server bridge layer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
